---
title: "nitrix.nn"
generated: true
signature-hash: dc27663499c9c730
description: "Functional neural-network forward-block kernels."
listing:
  id: nitrix-nn-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-nn/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.nn`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Functional neural-network forward-block kernels.

Pure `(Array, ...) -> Array` contractions for the inner kernels of
transformer and state-space model forward blocks, behind the standard
`backend=` dispatch (a `pallas-cuda` fused fast path with a `jax`
reference fallback). These are *functions*, not stateful modules: the
learnable modules that hold the parameters live in downstream libraries;
this subpackage owns only the inner kernel.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:__module__ -->
### Submodules

attention
    [`scaled_dot_product_attention`](nitrix-nn-attention/scaled_dot_product_attention.qmd) (dense / windowed additive-bias /
    causal / cross), with a flash-attention fast path.
ssm
    [`selective_scan`](nitrix-nn-ssm/selective_scan.qmd) (the selective state-space scan of Mamba / S6),
    with a parallel associative-scan GPU path and a fused chunked-scan
    kernel.
norm
    [`layer_norm`](nitrix-nn-norm/layer_norm.qmd), [`group_norm`](nitrix-nn-norm/group_norm.qmd), and `instance_norm`, each
    exposing the curse-of-depth `out_scale` hook; the fused single-pass
    kernel is performance-gated.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-nn-symbols}
:::
